title: Capability Drill-Down View
changes: Replace loadMissionDashboard() stub with real /api/mission-overview fetch
Render cap-cards with progress bars, task counts, click-to-drill-down
Drill-down shows requirements list (req_id_human, title, status)
Drill-down shows tasks with status badges and role colors
Server: /api/mission-overview and /api/capabilities/:capId already in server.js from v0.0.18
